description_long: This is a vintage-style coupe car with a deep blue body and black fenders, reminiscent of early 20th-century racing vehicles. The car features a long, rounded hood with visible hood straps, a classic upright grille, and two prominent round headlights. The open cockpit is outfitted with tan leather seats and a simple dashboard, with a large steering wheel and minimal instrumentation. The wheels are spoked and fitted with thin tires, and the rear of the car is streamlined, tapering gently toward the back. The overall design is elegant and sporty, with a low profile and exposed mechanical details that evoke a sense of speed and craftsmanship.
description: A vintage blue coupe car with black fenders, open tan cockpit, spoked wheels, and classic round headlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated blue body, black fenders, tan interior, and spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the upright grille, round headlights, and license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same blue body, black fenders, and open cockpit with steering wheel visible.
description_view_3: Rear-top view showing the streamlined back, tan seats, and dashboard layout.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
